OPPOSITION TO DFS' DEMURRER TO PLS' COMPLAINT OF UNLAWFUL DETAINER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAR, ROBERT CHAR, HELEN

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS GREGORY KUTCHUK, ELLA KOBZANETS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO FILE A NEW VERIFICATION. THE COMPLAINT ALLEGES THAT MORE THAN 3 DAYS HAVE ELAPSED SINCE THE SERVICE OF NOTICE UPON THE DEFENDANT ON SEPTEMBER 14 BUT THE VERIFICATION WAS SIGNED ON SEPTEMBER 17 WHICH DID NOT GIVE THE DEFENDANT THE REQUIRED 3 DAYS TO PERFORM OR QUIT. AFTER CLARIFICATION FROM COUNSEL, THE RULING APPLIES TO 3 CAUSES OF ACTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART, REPORTER: SUSAN CROZIER, CSR #4761

THE COMPLAINT ALLEGES THAT MORE THAN 3 DAYS HAVE ELAPSED SINCE THE SERVICE OF NOTICE UPON THE DEFENDANT ON SEPTEMBER 14 BUT THE VERIFICATION WAS SIGNED ON SEPTEMBER 17 WHICH DID NOT GIVE THE DEFENDANT THE REQUIRED 3 DAYS TO PERFORM OR QUIT. AFTER CLARIFICATION FROM COUNSEL, THE RULING APPLIES TO 3 CAUSES OF ACTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART, REPORTER: SUSAN CROZIER, CSR #4761 =301/JKS/PM
